headline: How Investors Are Reacting To United Airlines Holdings (UAL) Loyalty Tie-Up With JetBlue And Route Expansion
summary: In recent weeks, JetBlue Airways announced that its Blue Sky collaboration with United Airlines Holdings has moved into a new phase, with eligible TrueBlue and MileagePlus members now receiving reciprocal loyalty perks such as priority services, extra legroom access, and free checked bags across both networks. At the same time, United has been adding new international routes, resuming service to Caracas, and preparing for a busier summer travel season, underscoring how loyalty integration...

headline: Carnival and United Airlines Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the broader market sold-off particularly impacting consumer discretionary stocks amid persistent inflation and concerns over slowing demand.

headline: Stocks Slip Before the Open as Oil Rises on U.S.-Iran Peace Deal Uncertainty, PMI Data in Focus
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are down -0.40%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are down -0.55% this morning as oil prices and bond yields climbed, with investors watching to see whether hopes for a peace deal in the Middle East will turn into tangible progress.
